loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: This electrical meter does not measure runtime, service intervals, start counts, or availability — these are operational states not logged by the DG-1 MFM.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing average load percentage — run-hours and start counts are not measured by this electrical meter class.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total active energy, apparent power, and power factor — per-phase energy and MTBF/MTTR are not measured for this asset. energy isn't measured for this leaf on this asset — the only candidate was a power value (apparentPeakKva), a different physical quantity, so the leaf is left blank rather than shown under the wrong unit.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing Active Energy, Reactive Energy, Peak Demand, and Load Factor history. 'Autonomy index', 'Backup time score', and 'Load Headroom' are battery/autonomy domain scores not measured by this electrical meter and are omitted.

loop2: 'diesel-generator-asset-dashboard/operations-runtime' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Live Operations & Runtime (This electrical meter does not measure runtime, service intervals, start counts, or availability — these are operational states not logged by the DG-1 MFM.).
